title: Market Research
description: Conduct detailed market analysis to identify top-performing zero-gravity chairs as of 2024. Evaluate ergonomics, customer reviews, and pricing. Compile a list of at least 10 chairs to be included in the blog post.

title: SEO Copywriting
description: Develop content that targets high-traffic keywords related to zero-gravity chairs and back pain relief. Include meta descriptions and appropriate headings (H1, H2, etc.). Structure content to be engaging and informative.

title: Monetization Link Injection
description: Integrate affiliate links seamlessly within the blog content. Ensure links lead to reputable retail platforms offering affiliate programs. Maintain transparency with readers by providing an affiliate disclosure.

title: 5-Star Rating System Implementation
description: Implement a 5-star rating system for each recommended product, clearly displayed alongside each chair review.

title: Affiliate Disclosure Section
description: Add an affiliate disclosure section at the beginning or end of the post to inform readers of the affiliate nature of the links.

title: Draft Blog Post and SEO Optimization
description: Create a draft of the affiliate blog post following the specified structure and including all required components. Ensure the content is SEO-optimized and ready for publication.
